description_long: This is a robust, rectangular toolbox with a futuristic industrial design, featuring a hard yellow and black shell reinforced with metallic bands and corner guards. The sides are adorned with green illuminated accents, suggesting electronic or high-tech functionality. One side displays a digital control panel with a screen and several buttons, indicating advanced features or security access. The surface is mostly matte with some glossy highlights, and the structure appears to be made of metal and high-impact plastic. The box is compact but sturdy, likely designed to store and protect valuable tools or equipment. Its overall appearance suggests it is suitable for demanding urban or field environments.
description: A sturdy, yellow and black high-tech toolbox with reinforced corners, green illuminated accents, and a digital control panel.
description_view_0: Front view shows a reinforced panel with green lights and a central black section, no visible controls.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a digital control panel with a screen and buttons, plus reinforced yellow and black bands.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with green lights and a solid, reinforced panel, no controls visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side to the control panel, featuring a solid black panel with a green illuminated strip.
attribute_handle_type: Fixed, rectangular handle made of hard plastic or metal, integrated into the top surface for ergonomic grip.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Sliding or clasp latch mechanism made of metal or reinforced plastic, located on the front and sides, with no visible keyhole or combination lock.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied, with no visible trays or dividers; external control panel suggests possible internal electronic compartment.
